title: Crunching
description: A resource pack to rename the "Creaking" (and all associated blocks/subtitles) to the "Crunching"
body:
A resource pack for 24w40a and above that changes all the Creaking-related subtitles and blocks to "Crunching".

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/nDLmBv-2wb4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
